description: You are a sales manager performing end-of-quarter pipeline cleanup in Odoo CRM. Archive the following three stale opportunities to keep the pipeline accurate for forecasting: "Cloud Migration Assessment - GlobalTech Solutions", "POS System Rollout - Bay Area Retailers", and "Data Analytics Platform - Meridian Corp". Ensure these specific opportunities are deactivated (not deleted) and removed from the active pipeline view without modifying any other records.

target_opportunities: POS System Rollout - Bay Area Retailers
